title: Home searches
description: One home search the user is running — the brief, hard constraints, and commute targets everything else hangs off.

title.description: short name shown in the list, e.g. 'Lisbon 2-bed rental'

brief.description: the user's original free-text description of what they want ('bright, quiet street, near a park…')

mode.description: 'rent' | 'buy' — decides how true cost is computed

area.description: free-text target area(s), e.g. 'Lisbon: Arroios, Alameda, Anjos'

budgetMax.description: hard budget cap — monthly all-in for rent, total price for buy

budgetMin.description: optional lower bound (filters obvious mistakes / too-good-to-be-true)

currency.description: ISO currency code for the budget, e.g. 'EUR'

minRooms.description: minimum number of rooms (0 = no constraint)

minAreaSqm.description: minimum usable size in m² (0 = no constraint)

mustHaves.description: array of hard-requirement strings, e.g. ['elevator','pets allowed'] — a listing failing one is capped, never top-ranked

commuteTargets.description: array of { label, address, mode:'transit'|'walk'|'bike'|'drive', maxMinutes } the surveyor computes commutes against

sources.description: where this search's captures come from

listings.description: the canonical listings tracked for this search
